title: CASEF v0.6.1 common hash definitions
$comment: Development artifact: not represented as released until the immutable v0.6.1 Git tag exists. Future schemas consume definitions through exact $ref fragments.

sha256_hex_digest.description: Lowercase SHA-256 hexadecimal digest component only; this is not the complete canonical CASEF content-hash representation.

content_hash.description: Canonical CASEF v0.6.1 content hash. The algorithm prefix and lowercase hexadecimal digest are mandatory, and a bare digest is non-canonical. Pattern validity establishes no authenticity, correctness, scientific-validity, eligibility, or authority claim.

hash_domain.description: Exact globally canonical CASEF v0.6.1 input-hash domain tags. This definition does not define the corresponding domain-object schemas, and raw digest concatenation remains prohibited.
